reviews.review_description: Hi I’m the co owner and this game is amazing. We made so much progress and the mod team made it worth playing, even from its first scruffy versions. There is some bugs and problems but our devs are very active and will fix anything as soon as they can. Please enjoy this game as we have finally released it after 2 years of planning. Thank you if you tried the game and join our discord to support us which should be in the game but until wherever we might end up, please continue to support us, the team and the game itself. Thanks to all who play this game.😘

The game has so much jumpscares has good levels but a little glitchy but it is okay. I love the game. It's probably one of the best fan games I ever played and you should probably get it right now and hopefully this was helpful

I’ve been a friend of banan/owner for a while he was so excited back last February to publish it and he finally did on January 2026 and the jumpscares are scary and loud I js luv ur game banan
Your Sincerely
JoeyVRFS
Peak game. Js a little bug at some areas but overall, PEAKKKK
This game is so good its just a bit laggy and the light is a bit too bright when you get close but overall 5 ⭐️
Hi I'm one of the devs and the game is amazing
